headline: The White House reversed its two-week export restrictions on Anthropic's Fable and Mythos models as a wave of new model releases landed.
body: The White House lifted export controls that had frozen Anthropic's most advanced models, and Anthropic said it would restore Fable access beginning July 1, ending a two-week ban. The same window brought fresh model activity: Sonnet 5 shipped but drew a critical review showing it underperforming Opus 4.8 and GLM-5.2 while costing more, and Fable 5 was flagged as imminent. On the tooling side, Model Context Protocol broke out via a Google Cloud enterprise agent demo orchestrating Oracle databases, Looker, and vector stores, while forward deployment and software factories surfaced around the AI Engineer World's Fair.
